Headline: #39 Pershing Temporary Reroute at Indiana/41st
ShortDescription: #39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted via 39th, Indiana, 35th, State, then resume their normal route on 39th due to construction near Indiana/41st.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted via 39th, Prairie, 41st, State, then resume their normal route on 39th.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Indiana/41st.

Headline: #44 Wallace/Racine Temporary Reroute at Wallace/35th
